Create outbreak consensus summary

Source: R/outbreak_consensus_summary.R
outbreak_consensus_summary.Rd

Summarizes key outbreak indicators from incidence, Rt estimates, and growth model output.

Usage

outbreak_consensus_summary(
  incidence_data,
  rt_estimates,
  growth_fit,
  model_comparison = NULL,
  date_col = "date",
  count_col = "incidence"
)

Arguments

incidence_data

Data frame with incidence time series.

rt_estimates

Rt estimates tibble (e.g. from estimate_rt_epiestim()).

growth_fit

Output list from fit_poisson_growth().

model_comparison

Optional output from compare_incidence_models().

date_col

Name of date column in incidence_data.

count_col

Name of incidence column in incidence_data.

Value

A one-row tibble with high-level outbreak metrics.
